title: Video Analytics for Surveillance System
description: Developed a real-time surveillance system capable of detecting 5 security-critical events by training a custom YOLOv11 model.
achievements: Improved detection performance on 30,000+ annotated images by building and labeling a multi-class dataset using LabelImg.
Enabled real-time video analytics at 10 FPS by optimizing the inference and training pipeline with Ultralytics.
Enhanced model reliability through dataset augmentation, confidence-threshold tuning, and iterative evaluation.
